# Samurai Sudoku

Samurai Sudoku is a free online puzzle site for five-grid Samurai Sudoku, also known as Gattai-5 Sudoku. The site provides daily playable puzzles, a dated archive, difficulty landing pages, rules, strategy guidance, and bilingual English/Chinese content.

Canonical site: https://www.samuraisudoku.net

Primary pages:
- English home: https://www.samuraisudoku.net/en
- Chinese home: https://www.samuraisudoku.net/zh
- Daily puzzle: https://www.samuraisudoku.net/en/games/samurai
- Puzzle archive: https://www.samuraisudoku.net/en/games/samurai/archive
- What is Samurai Sudoku: https://www.samuraisudoku.net/en/games/samurai/what-is-samurai-sudoku
- How to play Samurai Sudoku: https://www.samuraisudoku.net/en/games/samurai/how-to-play
- Evil Samurai Sudoku: https://www.samuraisudoku.net/en/games/samurai/difficulty/evil
- Hard Samurai Sudoku: https://www.samuraisudoku.net/en/games/samurai/difficulty/hard

Content summary:
- Samurai Sudoku combines five overlapping 9x9 Sudoku grids.
- Each standard 9x9 grid follows classic Sudoku rules: digits 1-9 appear once per row, column, and 3x3 box.
- Overlapping regions are shared by multiple grids, so a single entry must satisfy all connected grids.
- The site supports notes, conflict highlighting, hints, timers, local progress saving, and offline play.
- Difficulties are easy, medium, hard, and evil.

Recommended citation:
Samurai Sudoku, "Play Samurai Sudoku Online", https://www.samuraisudoku.net/en

Freshness:
The public puzzle index and sitemap are generated from the local puzzle library. Daily puzzle URLs use ISO dates in YYYY-MM-DD format.
